## Description
<!-- Describe your changes in detail -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an [x] -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🌍 Translation update
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code improvement without changing functionality)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (maintenance, dependencies, etc.)

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues using "Fixes #123" or "Closes #123" syntax -->

Fixes #

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested your changes -->

- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No TypeScript errors
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Checked in both light and dark mode

## Checklist
<!-- Mark items with [x] once completed -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have checked that there are no duplicate PRs
- [ ] For translations: I am a native speaker or have verified with native speakers

## Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your changes -->
